gitFlow.sectionSubtitle: Seamlessly sync translations with your repository. Pull, edit, and push without leaving MovaBase.

connect.description: Connect your Git repository with OAuth. Select the repo and branch that contain your translation files.

edit.description: Make changes in our intuitive editor. Full history tracking means you can always roll back.

pr.description: Push your changes and create a PR — all from MovaBase. Review diffs and merge when ready.
pr.title: Open Pull Request

pull.description: Import existing translation files from your repo. MovaBase automatically parses JSON, .strings, XML, and PO formats.
pull.title: Pull Translations

sectionSubtitle: A complete toolkit for modern translation workflows.
